calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Uncontested Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Ingram, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jun-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gelb of Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP telephone number 310-203-4028 for Petitioner Allstate Settlement Corporation.
Alba Ingram telephone number 415-503-8685 in Propria Persona.

Ms. Ingram explained her understanding of what she is receiving, what she is giving up and why she needs to do this. PETITIONER ALLSTATE SETTLEMENT CORPORATION'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Alba Ingram, Transferor, And Allstate Settlement Corporation, Transferee, Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134 Et Seq. is approved. Mr. Gelb is to provide the paper work for confirmation of this transaction and a proposed order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
